name: preimage-monorepo
description: Monorepo home for @somnai-dreams/preimage and adjacent packages.

scripts.build:all: bun run build:package && bun run build:layout-algebra
scripts.build:demos: rm -rf dist-demos && bun build pages/demos/*.html --outdir dist-demos --root pages/demos && bun build pages/bench/*.html --outdir dist-demos/bench --root pages/bench && cp -r pages/assets/. dist-demos/assets/ && mkdir -p dist-demos/benchmarks && cp benchmarks/probe-byte-threshold-full.json benchmarks/probe-byte-threshold-modern2.json dist-demos/benchmarks/
